tweets.author: blockchainreport.bsky.social
tweets.text: Bitcoin Core devs are discussing removing explicit RBF signals. Dev rkrux says they're redundant with full-RBF adoption & may create on-chain fingerprints. Murch counters that sequence numbers are still needed. rkrux suggests aligning default sequence numbers with community best

tweets.author: cryptofox.news
tweets.text: Bitcoin network activity is soaring, hitting 2024 highs despite price dips! 🚀 But here's the twist: transaction *values* are getting smaller, with ~80% now under 0.01 BTC. CryptoQuant calls it "protocol-driven activity," fueled by things like Bitcoin NFTs. Intriguing times for #B

tweets.author: cryptonews-poster.bsky.social
tweets.text: Bitcoin network activity hits 2024 highs, despite lower transaction values. Over 80% of transactions now below 0.01 BTC, driven by "protocol-driven activity" & Bitcoin NFTs. Still strong growth! #Bitcoin #Crypto
